records.ety: [F. ocan, L. oceanus, Gr. 'wkeano`s ocean, in Homer, the great river supposed to encompass the earth.]

defs: The whole body of salt water which covers more than three fifths of the surface of the globe; -- called also the sea, or great sea.
quotes: Like the odor of brine from the ocean Comes the thought of other years.

defs: One of the large bodies of water into which the great ocean is regarded as divided, as the Atlantic, Pacific, Indian, Arctic and Antarctic oceans.
An immense expanse; any vast space or quantity without apparent limits; as, the boundless ocean of eternity; an ocean of affairs.
quotes: You're gonna need an ocean Of calamine lotion.

defs: Of or pertaining to the main or great sea; as, the ocean waves; an ocean stream.
